summary: Iteration 50 — Employee Master PDF + Scan Documents. Backend: 23/23 new tests pass (single & bulk PDF, upload/list/get/delete docs, validation of category/mime/base64/size, role-based access control including cross-company scope). Regression: iter49 secure-fields tests re-run — 11/11 pass. Frontend smoke on /employee-master?user_id=... rendered correctly under super_admin OTP-dev session: Master data sheet card with 'Download / Print PDF' visible (testID=download-master-pdf), 'Scan documents (0)' section with 'Add' button (testID=add-doc-btn) visible, upload modal opens with EXACTLY 11 category chips. Total 34/34 backend tests green + frontend UI verified.
action_items: OPTIONAL: add `pypdf` (>=5) to /app/backend/requirements.txt for reproducible builds — currently only transitively installed. reportlab already pinned.

OPTIONAL: consider stripping `temp_credentials.temp_pin/temp_password` from GET /api/companies/{id}/details once the admin logs in but before they change their PIN — right now super_admin can retrieve the plaintext until pin_must_change flips. (Not a regression — matches iter49 behaviour and existing tests explicitly assert this.)
critical_code_review_comments: utils/employee_pdf.py — clean, small (566 lines), self-contained. Uses reportlab platypus + optional pypdf/PyPDF2 fallback for bulk-merge. No secrets logged.

server.py Iter-50 block (lines 8020-8345) uses require_role(['company_admin','super_admin']) on all 5 new endpoints, and _load_scoped_employee_any_role enforces per-company scope. Base64 excluded from list responses via Mongo projection {base64: 0} AND via _emp_doc_public serializer — defence-in-depth.
server.py — MAX_DOC_BASE64_LEN = 15 MB (accepting ~10 MB decoded) is documented and honoured; 413 returned above threshold, 400 for invalid base64/mime/category. Matches PRD.
employee-master.tsx — all interactive elements carry testID (download-master-pdf, add-doc-btn, cat-{key}, doc-label-input, doc-pick-upload, doc-{id}, view-doc-{id}, delete-doc-{id}).
server.py is 8366 lines — RECOMMEND SPLIT: many iterations of endpoints packed into one file. Not blocking for iter50 but a future refactor target.
seed_data_creation: 2 throwaway companies (TEST_Iter50_A_*, TEST_Iter50_B_*) with 1 employee each, plus 2 uploaded scan documents (later 1 deleted). Companies are cleaned up in fixture teardown. Master-PDF snapshots persisted in employee_master_pdfs are left as-is (audit trail by design).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 50 is fully green. If next iteration modifies the Employee Master PDF or Scan-Document flow, re-run: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iter50_master_pdf_and_docs.py -v — 23 tests. If OTP dev-mode ever gets disabled, both this file and iter49 need a new auth harness (see _otp_login helper). Note: during OTP verify of super_admin, the flow redirects to /pin-change because pin_must_change is currently True on the super_admin record — do not submit that form (per test_credentials.md).
rca_of_issue: N/A — no defects found this iteration.
